title: helictotrichon bromoides subsp. pauneroae
intro: Helictotrichon bromoides subsp. pauneroae, also known as Paunero's bent, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is a perennial grass that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helictotrichon bromoides subsp. pauneroae include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Paunero's bent can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
